dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3799 IS: Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Marshall (for himself, Mrs. Gillibrand, and Ms. Baldwin) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the Healthy Start Initiative.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026.

Section 330H(e)(1) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254c–8(e)(1)) is amended by striking appropriated and all that follows through the period at the end and inserting appropriated $145,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030..
